Title: Includes wearing, carrying, or displaying a symbol of a designated foreign terrorist organization in a public place as aggravated harassment in the first degree
Summary: Includes wearing, carrying, or displaying an emblem, insignia, logo or other symbol of a designated foreign terrorist organization in a public place in a manner reasonably understood to be a threat or act of intimidation directed at a person or group of people as aggravated harassment in the first degree.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the penal law, in relation to the crime of aggravated harassment in the first degree
